descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes sweep Delta Flyers in BCJHL Coastal Division final, advance to league championship series against Vernon.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Delta Flyers 3-2 on March 12, 1988 to sweep their best-of-seven BCJHL Coastal Division final in straight games. Rob Clark scored two goals in the third game, a 5-3 Richmond victory. The Sockeyes now face Interior champion Vernon in a best-of-seven series for the BCJHL league championship.
